channel.title: TalkOrigins Archive
channel.description: Modernized TalkOrigins Archive preview with stable legacy routes, search, feedback, workbench, Notebook, and translation staging.

item.title: TalkOrigins modernized edition
item.description: The poc3 candidate presents the Archive with responsive pages, route preservation, search, feedback, workbench, Notebook, and translation staging.

item.title: TOA Lite portable download
item.description: The current public-files-only TOA Lite package is available for offline reading and USB distribution. Latest zip size is approximately 174 MB.

item.title: Translation queue status
item.description: Current initial-language translation status: es: 2866 complete / 2866 queued, fr: 2866 complete / 2866 queued, de: 2382 complete / 2866 queued, pt: 2332 complete / 2866 queued.

item.title: Index to Creationist Claims
item.description: The generated claims index is available in the modernized candidate tree with route-preserving claim pages.

item.title: Static feedback archive
item.description: Past feedback compilations are exposed as static resources, while new submissions use the managed /fb route.

item.title: Search, workbench, and Notebook routes
item.description: Dynamic routes are represented in the poc3 candidate for search, feedback, workbench, and Notebook support.
